    Methods in microui.core.base that return Container
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Container
    Container.add(ContentView contentView, LayoutParams layoutParams)
    Adds a ContentView to the container with specified layout parameters.
    Container
    Container.add(ContentView contentView, LayoutParams layoutParams, int id)
    Adds a ContentView to the container with specified layout parameters and numeric ID.
    Container
    Container.add(ContentView contentView, LayoutParams layoutParams, String textId)
    Adds a ContentView to the container with specified layout parameters and text ID.
    Container
    ContainerManager.findById(int id)
    Searches for a container by its numeric ID.
    Container
    ContainerManager.findByTextId(String textId)
    Searches for a container by its text ID.
    Container
    ContainerManager.getById(int id)
    Retrieves a container by its numeric ID.
    Container
    ContainerManager.getByTextId(String textId)
    Retrieves a container by its text ID.
    Container
    Container.remove(ContentView contentView)
    Removes a ContentView from the container.
    Container
    Container.removeById(int id)
    Removes a ContentView from the container by its numeric ID.
    Container
    Container.removeByTextId(String textId)
    Removes a ContentView from the container by its text ID.
    Container
    Container.setMode(Container.Mode mode)
    Sets the container mode.
    Methods in microui.core.base with parameters of type Container
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ContainerManager.add(Container container)
    Adds a container to the manager.
    void
    ContainerManager.add(Container container, int id)
    Adds a container to the manager with a numeric ID.
    void
    ContainerManager.add(Container container, String textId)
    Adds a container to the manager with a text ID.
    void
    ContainerManager.remove(Container... containers)
    Removes one or more containers from the manager.
    void
    ContainerManager.switchOn(Container container)
    Switches to the specified container with animation.
    void
    ContainerManager.switchOn(Container container, ContainerManager.AnimatorMode animatorMode)
    Switches to the specified container with a specific animation mode.

    Method
    Description

    Description
